---
title: "Women's Health"
author:
  - name: "Maria Teresa Brito"
  - name: "Nathan Constantine-Cooke"
    corresponding: true
    url: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=2emHWR0AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    affiliations:
      - ref: IGC
bibliography: Baseline.bib   
---

## Introduction

```{R}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(flextable)
library(readxl)
library(tidytext)

# Setup data paths
if (file.exists("/docker")) {
  # Docker environment
  data_path <- "data/final/"
} else {
  # Native OS (MacOS/Windows detection)
  if (Sys.info()["sysname"] != "Darwin") {
    # Windows
    data_path <- "//cmvm.datastore.ed.ac.uk/igmm/cvallejo-predicct/people/Teresa/PREdiCCt/"
  } else {
    # MacOS
    data_path <- "/Volumes/igmm/cvallejo-predicct/people/Teresa/PREdiCCt/"
  }
}

# Load data for descriptive analyses
data_file_replace_values <- read_excel(
  paste0(data_path, "Womenshealth replace values 5.5 data cleaning.xlsx")
)
```

This page describes women's health characteristics collected by the PREdiCCt study, including pregnancy status, contraception use, menstrual cycle characteristics, and premenstrual syndrome.

## Demographics

### Age

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-age
#| tbl-cap: "Age distribution in the women's health cohort."
Age_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  mutate(Age_category = case_when(
    Age < 16 ~ "<16",
    Age >= 16 & Age <= 45 ~ "16-45", 
    Age > 45 ~ ">45"
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Age_category)) %>%  
  count(Age_category, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count))

Age_table_present <- flextable(Age_table) %>% 
  set_header_labels(Age_category = "Age category") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

Age_table_present
```

### BMI

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-bmi
#| tbl-cap: "BMI category distribution in the women's health cohort."
BMI_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  count(BMIcat, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(BMIcat))

BMI_table_present <- flextable(BMI_table) %>% 
  set_header_labels(BMIcat = "BMI Category") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

BMI_table_present
```

### Ethnicity

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-ethnicity
#| tbl-cap: "Ethnicity distribution in the women's health cohort."
Ethnicity_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  mutate(Ethnicity = if_else(
    is.na(Ethnicity) | Ethnicity == "", 
    "No data", 
    Ethnicity
  )) %>% 
  count(Ethnicity, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count))

Ethnicity_table_present <- flextable(Ethnicity_table) %>% 
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

Ethnicity_table_present
```

### Index of Multiple Deprivation

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-imd
#| tbl-cap: "IMD distribution in the women's health cohort."
IMD_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  mutate(IMD = as.character(IMD)) %>% 
  mutate(IMD = if_else(
    is.na(IMD) | IMD == "",
    "No data",
    IMD
  )) %>%
  count(IMD, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1))

IMD_table_present <- flextable(IMD_table) %>% 
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

IMD_table_present
```

### Smoking Status

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-smoking
#| tbl-cap: "Smoking status in the women's health cohort."
Smoking_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  mutate(Smoke = if_else(
    is.na(Smoke) | Smoke == "",
    "No data",
    Smoke
  )) %>%
  count(Smoke, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count))

Smoking_table_present <- flextable(Smoking_table) %>% 
  set_header_labels(Smoke = "Smoking status") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

Smoking_table_present
```

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-vaping
#| tbl-cap: "Electronic cigarette use in the women's health cohort."
Vape_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  mutate(ECigs = if_else(
    is.na(ECigs) | ECigs == "",
    "No data",
    ECigs
  )) %>%
  count(ECigs, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count))

Vape_table_present <- flextable(Vape_table) %>% 
  set_header_labels(ECigs = "Electronic cigarette smoking status") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

Vape_table_present
```

## Clinical Information

### Diagnosis

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-diagnosis
#| tbl-cap: "IBD diagnosis distribution in the women's health cohort."
Dx_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  mutate(diagnosis = if_else(
    is.na(diagnosis) | diagnosis == "",
    "No data",
    diagnosis
  )) %>%
  count(diagnosis, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count))

Dx_table_present <- flextable(Dx_table) %>% 
  set_header_labels(diagnosis = "Diagnosis") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

Dx_table_present
```

### Time Since Diagnosis

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-time-since-dx
#| fig-cap: "Time since diagnosis in the female PREdiCCt cohort."
#| warning: false
timesinceDx_histogram <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = IBD_Duration)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4, fill = "#53278f") +
  labs(
    x = "Time since diagnosis in years",
    y = "Density",
    title = "Time since diagnosis in the female PREdiCCt cohort"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

timesinceDx_histogram
```

### Faecal Calprotectin

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-fc-dist
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of faecal calprotectin levels in the female PREdiCCt cohort."
#| warning: false
calpro_histogram <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = FC)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4, fill = "#9C072C") +
  labs(
    x = "Faecal calprotectin level",
    y = "Density",
    title = "Distribution of Faecal Calprotectin levels in the female PREdiCCt cohort"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

calpro_histogram
```

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-fc-cat
#| tbl-cap: "Faecal calprotectin categories in the women's health cohort."
CalproCat_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  count(cat, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cat))

CalproCat_table_present <- flextable(CalproCat_table) %>% 
  set_header_labels(cat = "Calprotectin level") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

CalproCat_table_present
```

### Biologic Use

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-biologic
#| tbl-cap: "Biologic therapy use in the women's health cohort."
BioCat_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  count(Biologic_cat, name = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Biologic_cat))

BioCat_table_present <- flextable(BioCat_table) %>% 
  set_header_labels(Biologic_cat = "Biologic category") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

BioCat_table_present
```

## Pregnancy and Breastfeeding

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-pregnancy
#| tbl-cap: "Pregnancy and breastfeeding status in the women's health cohort."
pregnancy_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  summarise(
    CurrentlyPregnant = sum(CurrentlyPregnant == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    MaternityLeave = sum(MaternityLeave == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    TryingGetPregnant = sum(TryingGetPregnant == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    PregnancyBreastfeeding = sum(PregnancyBreastfeeding == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Variable = recode(Variable,
    "CurrentlyPregnant" = "Currently pregnant",
    "MaternityLeave" = "On maternity leave",
    "TryingGetPregnant" = "Trying to conceive",
    "PregnancyBreastfeeding" = "Breastfeeding"
  ))

Pregnancy_table_present <- flextable(pregnancy_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(Variable = "Pregnancy Status") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

Pregnancy_table_present
```

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-pregnancy
#| fig-cap: "Pregnancy and breastfeeding status visualized."
pregnancy_barchart <- pregnancy_table %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Variable, y = Count)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#53278f", width = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.3) +
  labs(
    title = "Pregnancy & breastfeeding",
    x = "Pregnancy status",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

pregnancy_barchart
```

## Contraception

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-contraception
#| tbl-cap: "Contraception methods used in the women's health cohort."
contraception_table_no_IU_distinction <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  summarise(
    Barrier = sum(Barrier == "1", na.rm = TRUE),
    OralContraception = sum(OralContraception == "1", na.rm = TRUE),
    Injectable = sum(Injectable == "1", na.rm = TRUE),
    Implant = sum(Implant == "1", na.rm = TRUE),
    Sterilised = sum(Sterilised == "1", na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Variable = recode(Variable,
    "Barrier" = "Barrier",
    "OralContraception" = "Oral Contraception",
    "Injectable" = "Injection",
    "Implant" = "Implant",
    "Sterilised" = "Sterilised"
  ))

mirena_copper <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  count(IntrauterineContraceptionDevice) %>%
  filter(IntrauterineContraceptionDevice %in% c("Mirena", "Copper")) %>%
  rename(
    Variable = IntrauterineContraceptionDevice,
    Count = n
  ) %>%
  mutate(Variable = recode(Variable,
    "Mirena" = "Mirena IUS",
    "Copper" = "Copper IUD"
  ))

contraception_table <- bind_rows(contraception_table_no_IU_distinction, mirena_copper) %>%
  arrange(Count) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      Variable %in% c("Barrier", "Sterilised", "Copper IUD") ~ "Non-hormonal",
      Variable %in% c("Oral Contraception", "Injection", "Implant", "Mirena IUS") ~ "Hormonal",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    Variable = reorder_within(Variable, Count, Group),
    Variable = str_remove(Variable, "___.*$")
  ) %>%
  arrange(Group, Count) %>%
  select(Group, Variable, Count)

contraception_ft <- flextable(contraception_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Variable = "Contraception Method",
    Count = "Number of Patients",
    Group = ""
  ) %>%
  merge_v(j = "Group") %>%
  valign(j = "Group", valign = "top") %>%
  bold(i = ~ !is.na(Group), j = "Group", bold = TRUE) %>%
  autofit()

contraception_ft
```

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-contraception
#| fig-cap: "Contraception methods by type."
#| fig-width: 10
contraception_barchart <- contraception_table %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Variable, y = Count, fill = Variable)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ Group, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Purples") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Users",
    title = "Contraception Methods by Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

contraception_barchart
```

## Menstrual Characteristics

### Period Pain

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-period-pain
#| tbl-cap: "Period pain severity in the women's health cohort."
PeriodPain_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  filter(!is.na(PeriodTypePain), PeriodTypePain != "N/A") %>% 
  count(PeriodTypePain, name = "Frequency") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Frequency / sum(Frequency) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Frequency))

PeriodPain_table_present <- flextable(PeriodPain_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(PeriodTypePain = "Period Pain") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

PeriodPain_table_present
```

### Blood Loss

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-blood-loss
#| tbl-cap: "Menstrual blood loss in the women's health cohort."
BloodLoss_table <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  filter(!is.na(DescribeBloodLoss), DescribeBloodLoss != "N/A") %>% 
  count(DescribeBloodLoss, name = "Frequency") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = round(Frequency / sum(Frequency) * 100, 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(Frequency))

BloodLoss_table_present <- flextable(BloodLoss_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(DescribeBloodLoss = "Blood Loss") %>%
  align(align = "center", j = c(2:3), part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

BloodLoss_table_present
```

### Period Length

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-period-length
#| fig-cap: "Reported range of period length (filtered < 20 days)."
#| fig-height: 8


data_file_replace_values <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  mutate(
    BleedingShortestDays = as.numeric(BleedingShortestDays),
    BleedingLongestDays = as.numeric(BleedingLongestDays),
    UsualNumberDaysPeriod = as.numeric(UsualNumberDaysPeriod)
  )
        


PeriodLength_graph <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  select(BleedingShortestDays, BleedingLongestDays, DaysBleedingAverage) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "Measure",
    values_to = "Days"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Days), Days != 0, Days < 20) %>%
  mutate(Measure = recode(Measure,
    "BleedingShortestDays" = "Shortest",
    "DaysBleedingAverage" = "Average",
    "BleedingLongestDays" = "Longest"
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Days, colour = Measure, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Average" = "#53278f", 
    "Shortest" = "#07779C", 
    "Longest" = "#9C072C" 
  )) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "Average" = "#53278f",
    "Shortest" = "#07779C",
    "Longest" = "#9C072C"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of Days",
    y = "Density",
    title = "Reported range of period length (filtered < 20 days)",
    colour = "Number of days bleeding",
    fill = "Number of days bleeding"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(Measure))

PeriodLength_graph
```

### Cycle Length

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-cycle-length-bar
#| fig-cap: "Patient-reported cycle length."
cycle_length_barchart <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  filter(!is.na(UsualNumberDaysPeriod), UsualNumberDaysPeriod != 0) %>%
  count(UsualNumberDaysPeriod) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = UsualNumberDaysPeriod, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#53278f") +
  geom_text(
    data = . %>% filter(n == max(n)),
    aes(label = UsualNumberDaysPeriod),
    vjust = -0.3
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Usual cycle length in days",
    y = "Number of patients",
    title = "Patient-reported cycle length"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

cycle_length_barchart
```

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-cycle-length
#| fig-cap: "Reported range of cycle length."
#| fig-height: 8
CycleLength_graph <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  select(PeriodShortestDays, PeriodLongestDays, UsualNumberDaysPeriod) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "Measure",
    values_to = "Days"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Days), Days != 0) %>%
  mutate(Measure = recode(Measure,
    "PeriodShortestDays" = "Shortest",
    "PeriodLongestDays" = "Longest",
    "UsualNumberDaysPeriod" = "Average"
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Days, colour = Measure, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Average" = "#53278f",
    "Shortest" = "#9a6fb5",
    "Longest" = "#c4a7d1"
  )) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "Average" = "#53278f",
    "Shortest" = "#c4a7d1",
    "Longest" = "#9a6fb5"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of Days",
    y = "Density",
    title = "Reported range of cycle length",
    colour = "Length of cycle in days",
    fill = "Length of cycle in days"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(Measure))

CycleLength_graph
```

## Premenstrual Syndrome

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-pms
#| tbl-cap: "Premenstrual syndrome in the women's health cohort."
pms_suffer_summary <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  filter(KnowWhatPMSIs == "Yes", !is.na(SufferPMS)) %>%
  count(SufferPMS, name = "Count")

pms_active_summary <- data_file_replace_values %>%
  filter(KnowWhatPMSIs == "Yes", SufferPMS == "Yes") %>%
  count(PMSDuringActiveIBD, name = "Count", drop = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(PMSDuringActiveIBD = if_else(
    is.na(PMSDuringActiveIBD),
    "No data",
    PMSDuringActiveIBD
  ))

pms_table <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Category, ~Response, ~Count,
  "Suffers from PMS", "No", as.integer(pms_suffer_summary %>% filter(SufferPMS == "No") %>% pull(Count)),
  "Suffers from PMS", "Yes", as.integer(pms_suffer_summary %>% filter(SufferPMS == "Yes") %>% pull(Count)),
  "PMS symptoms during active disease", "Better", as.integer(pms_active_summary %>% filter(PMSDuringActiveIBD == "Better") %>% pull(Count)),
  "PMS symptoms during active disease", "Worse", as.integer(pms_active_summary %>% filter(PMSDuringActiveIBD == "Worse") %>% pull(Count)),
  "PMS symptoms during active disease", "The same", as.integer(pms_active_summary %>% filter(PMSDuringActiveIBD == "The same") %>% pull(Count)),
  "PMS symptoms during active disease", "No data", as.integer(pms_active_summary %>% filter(PMSDuringActiveIBD == "No data") %>% pull(Count))
)

pms_table_present <- flextable(pms_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Category = "PMS Category",
    Response = "Response",
    Count = "Count"
  ) %>%
  merge_v(j = "Category") %>%
  padding(i = 3:6, j = "Response", padding.left = 30) %>%
  bg(i = 3:6, bg = "#f2f0f7") %>%
  bold(i = 1:2, j = "Response", bold = TRUE) %>%
  hline(i = 2) %>% 
  valign(valign = "top") %>%
  autofit()

pms_table_present
```

## Faecal Calprotectin Analyses

### Violin Plots

```{R}
#| message: false
library(patchwork)

# Load data with FC for violin plots
demo_fc <- read.csv(paste0(
  data_path,
  "Womenshealth replace values 9.0 log(FC) and meno2 and hormonal2.csv"
)) %>%
  mutate(FC = as.numeric(FC))

demo_fc$meno2 <- factor(demo_fc$meno2, levels = c("Pre-menopausal", "Post-menopausal"))

# Filter to pre-menopausal for some plots
demo_premeno_fc <- demo_fc %>%
  filter(meno2 == "Pre-menopausal")
```

#### Menopausal Status and FC

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-fc-meno
#| fig-cap: "Faecal calprotectin levels by menopausal status."
p1 <- ggplot(data = subset(demo_fc, !is.na(meno2)), 
            aes(x = meno2, y = FC, fill = meno2)) + 
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Menopausal status", y = "log(FC)") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#b163c1", "#63c1b1")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  ylim(1, 9)

p1
```

#### Irregular Cycles and FC

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-fc-irregular
#| fig-cap: "Faecal calprotectin levels by cycle regularity (pre-menopausal women)."
p2 <- ggplot(data = subset(demo_premeno_fc, !is.na(PeriodIrregular)), 
            aes(x = PeriodIrregular, y = FC, fill = PeriodIrregular)) + 
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Irregular periods", y = "log(FC)") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#ea9000", "#005aea")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  ylim(1, 9)

p2
```

#### Rectal Bleeding and FC

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-fc-bleeding
#| fig-cap: "Faecal calprotectin levels by increased rectal bleeding during menses (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_premeno_fc$PassMoreBlood <- factor(demo_premeno_fc$PassMoreBlood, levels = c("Disagree", "Agree"))

p3 <- ggplot(data = subset(demo_premeno_fc, !is.na(PassMoreBlood)),
             aes(x = PassMoreBlood, y = FC, fill = PassMoreBlood)) + 
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Increased rectal bleeding during menses", y = "log(FC)") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#9cbb1e", "#bb1e1e")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  ylim(1, 9)

p3
```

#### Hormonal Contraception and FC

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-fc-contraception
#| fig-cap: "Faecal calprotectin levels by hormonal contraception use (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_premeno_fc$hormonal2 <- factor(demo_premeno_fc$hormonal2, levels = c("No", "Yes"))

p4 <- ggplot(data = subset(demo_premeno_fc, !is.na(hormonal2)), 
            aes(x = hormonal2, y = FC, fill = hormonal2)) + 
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Use of hormonal contraception", y = "log(FC)") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#00ebff", "#ff0085")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  ylim(1, 9)

p4
```

#### Combined Violin Plot

```{R}
#| label: fig-wh-fc-combined
#| fig-cap: "Baseline FC by demographic factors."
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 7
patch <- p1 + labs(title = "Baseline FC by demographic factors") | p2 | p3 | p4

patch

# Save combined plot
dir.create("plots/violin", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
plot_path <- "plots/violin/violin"

cairo_pdf(paste0(plot_path, ".pdf"), width = 14, height = 7)
print(patch, newpage = FALSE)
dev.off()

png(paste0(plot_path, ".png"), width = 14, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(patch, newpage = FALSE)
dev.off()
```

### Chi-Square Tests: Associations with FC Category

```{R}
#| message: false
library(descr)

# Prepare data for chi-square tests
demo_chisq <- demo_fc
demo_chisq$cat <- as.factor(demo_chisq$cat)
```

#### Menopausal Status

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-meno
#| tbl-cap: "Association between menopausal status and FC category."
demo_chisq$meno2 <- as.factor(demo_chisq$meno2)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq$meno2,
  demo_chisq$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Menopausal status", "FC category")
)
```

#### Hormonal Contraception Use (Pre-menopausal)

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-contraception
#| tbl-cap: "Association between hormonal contraception use and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno <- demo_chisq %>%
  filter(meno2 == "Pre-menopausal")

demo_chisq_premeno$hormonal2 <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$hormonal2)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$hormonal2,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Hormonal contraception use", "FC category")
)
```

#### Irregular Periods (Pre-menopausal)

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-irregular
#| tbl-cap: "Association between irregular periods and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno$PeriodIrregular <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$PeriodIrregular)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$PeriodIrregular,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Irregular period", "FC category")
)
```

#### Period Pain (Pre-menopausal)

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-pain
#| tbl-cap: "Association between dysmenorrhoea and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno$PeriodTypePain <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$PeriodTypePain)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$PeriodTypePain,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Dysmenorrhoea", "FC category")
)
```

#### Blood Loss (Pre-menopausal)

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-bloodloss
#| tbl-cap: "Association between menstrual blood loss and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno$DescribeBloodLoss <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$DescribeBloodLoss)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$DescribeBloodLoss,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Blood loss", "FC category")
)
```

#### Passing Clots (Pre-menopausal)

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-clots
#| tbl-cap: "Association between passing clots and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno$PassClots <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$PassClots)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$PassClots,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Pass clots", "FC category")
)
```

#### PMS (Pre-menopausal)

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-pms
#| tbl-cap: "Association between PMS and FC category (pre-menopausal women who know what PMS is)."
demo_chisq_premeno_pms <- demo_chisq_premeno %>%
  filter(KnowWhatPMSIs == "Yes")

demo_chisq_premeno_pms$SufferPMS <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno_pms$SufferPMS)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno_pms$SufferPMS,
  demo_chisq_premeno_pms$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Suffer from PMS", "FC category")
)
```

#### IBD Symptoms During Menses (Pre-menopausal)

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-ibd-bleeding
#| tbl-cap: "Association between increased rectal bleeding during menses and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno$PassMoreBlood <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$PassMoreBlood)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$PassMoreBlood,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Pass more blood", "FC category")
)
```

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-ibd-bowel
#| tbl-cap: "Association between more bowel movements during menses and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno$MoreBowelMovements <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$MoreBowelMovements)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$MoreBowelMovements,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("More bowel movements", "FC category")
)
```

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-ibd-looser
#| tbl-cap: "Association between looser bowel movements during menses and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno$LooserBowelMovements <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$LooserBowelMovements)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$LooserBowelMovements,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Looser bowel movements", "FC category")
)
```

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-chisq-ibd-nausea
#| tbl-cap: "Association between nausea during menses and FC category (pre-menopausal women)."
demo_chisq_premeno$ProblemsNausea <- as.factor(demo_chisq_premeno$ProblemsNausea)

CrossTable(
  demo_chisq_premeno$ProblemsNausea,
  demo_chisq_premeno$cat,
  digits = 3,
  expected = TRUE,
  prop.r = TRUE,
  prop.c = FALSE,
  prop.t = TRUE,
  prop.chisq = FALSE,
  chisq = TRUE,
  fisher = TRUE,
  dnn = c("Nausea", "FC category")
)
```

## Summary Tables

```{R}
#| message: false
library(table1)
library(survival)

# Custom rendering function for continuous variables
my.render.cont <- function(x) {
  with(
    stats.apply.rounding(stats.default(x),
                         digits = 3,
                         round.integers = FALSE
    ),
    c("", "Median (IQR)" = sprintf("%s (%s - %s)", MEDIAN, Q1, Q3))
  )
}

# Load data with survival variables (reuse data_path from earlier)
demo <- read.csv(paste0(
  data_path,
  "Womenshealth replace values 9.0 log(FC) and meno2 and hormonal2.csv"
)) %>%
  mutate(
    DaysSinceLastPeriod = as.numeric(DaysSinceLastPeriod),
    FC = as.numeric(FC)
  )

# Transform FC back from log scale
demo <- demo %>%
  mutate(FC_exp = exp(FC))

# Create comparison dataset
# Overall cohort
comp <- demo
comp$cohort <- "All"

# Subset to just pre-menopausal from overall cohort
premeno <- demo %>%
  filter(
    Menopause == "No" |
      (Menopause == "Yes" & Age < 40 & 
         (FormContraception == "Yes" | PregnancyBreastfeeding == "Yes"))
  )

premeno$cohort <- "Pre-menopausal"
comp <- rbind(comp, premeno)

# Subset to just post-menopausal from overall cohort
postmeno <- demo %>%
  filter(Menopause == "Yes" &
         !(Age < 40 & (FormContraception == "Yes" | PregnancyBreastfeeding == "Yes" | HormoneReplacementStillTaking == "Yes"))
)

postmeno$cohort <- "Post-menopausal"
comp <- rbind(comp, postmeno)

# Set cohort factor levels
comp$cohort <- factor(comp$cohort,
                      levels = c("All", "Pre-menopausal", "Post-menopausal"),
                      labels = c("Full cohort", "Pre-menopausal cohort", "Post-menopausal cohort")
)

# Convert numeric variables
comp <- comp %>%
  mutate(
    Age = as.numeric(Age),
    IBD_Duration = as.numeric(IBD_Duration),
    IMD = as.numeric(IMD),
    control_8 = as.numeric(control_8),
    CReactiveProtein = as.numeric(CReactiveProtein),
    FC_exp = as.numeric(FC_exp)
  )
```

### Table 1: Participant Characteristics by Cohort

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-characteristics
#| tbl-cap: "Baseline characteristics of the women's health cohort stratified by menopausal status."
table1(
  ~ Age +
    Ethnicity +
    BMIcat +
    diagnosis +
    IBD_Duration +
    IMD +
    Smoke +
    ECigs +
    control_8 +
    vas_control +
    FC_exp +
    CReactiveProtein +
    Surgery +
    Biologic_cat | cohort,
  data = comp,
  render.continuous = my.render.cont,
  overall = FALSE
)
```

### Survival Summary

```{R}
#| label: tbl-wh-survival-summary
#| tbl-cap: "Survival summary at 2 years for objective flare in the full cohort."

# Calculate survival at 2 years
demo_survival <- demo %>%
  mutate(
    hardflare_time = as.numeric(hardflare_time),
    hardflare = as.numeric(hardflare)
  )

surv_summary <- summary(
  survfit(Surv(hardflare_time, hardflare) ~ 1, data = demo_survival),
  times = 365.25 * 2 - 1
)

# Create summary table
surv_df <- data.frame(
  Time = surv_summary$time,
  N_at_risk = surv_summary$n.risk,
  N_events = surv_summary$n.event,
  Survival = round(surv_summary$surv, 3),
  Lower_95_CI = round(surv_summary$lower, 3),
  Upper_95_CI = round(surv_summary$upper, 3)
)

knitr::kable(surv_df, col.names = c(
  "Time (days)",
  "N at risk",
  "N events",
  "Survival probability",
  "Lower 95% CI",
  "Upper 95% CI"
))
```
